48],[355,540,1776531110862],[356,540,1776531110872],[357,539,1776531110885],[358,539,1776531110893],[358,538,1776531110906],[359,537,1776531110917],[358,537,1776531110939],[357,537,1776531110950],[356,537,1776531110959],[355,537,1776531110975],[354,536,1776531110990],[353,536,1776531111002],[352,536,1776531111015],[351,536,1776531111021],[350,536,1776531111031],[351,536,1776531111058],[352,536,1776531111070],[353,536,1776531111080],[354,536,1776531111092],[355,536,1776531111120],[356,536,1776531111131],[357,536,1776531111143],[358,536,1776531111151],[359,536,1776531111167],[360,536,1776531111182],[361,535,1776531111189]],"mm-mp":19.338010204081634,"md":[[359,536,1776531110931]],"md-mp":3392.0,"mu":[[359,536,1776531111052]],"mu-mp":3403.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
